prose:
Aniline frontier orbital gap computed via DFT using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry from user-supplied .xyz file (single-point calculation, not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048 eV (Koopmans-style orbital-energy difference). Integrity trustworthy: true. No warnings. Method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP DFT single-point in PySCF.</prose>
